title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems already understand humans and may be conscious, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than expected, and that the field is advancing faster than he anticipated. He expresses concern about job losses, corporate self-regulation limitations, and the need for regulatory oversight to steer AI development safely.
